ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_fips_code" TEXT /* Two-digit state identifier, developed by the National Bureau of Standards */,
  "county_fips_code" TEXT /* Three-digit county identifier, developed by the National Bureau of Standards */,
  "chsi_county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "chsi_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the State or District of Columbia */,
  "chsi_state_abbr" TEXT /* Two-character postal abbreviation for state name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population per square mile */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the county */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this demographic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_fips_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips_code") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_fips_code FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips_code") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population per square mile of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population per square mile */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to demographic data */,
  "health_indicator" TEXT /* Health indicator being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reported health outcome */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this health outcome record */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to collect the health data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic factor record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to demographic data */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the socioeconomic factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the socioeconomic factor */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this socioeconomic factor record */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to collect the socioeconomic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_factors_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_factors_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's website or documentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting's purpose */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., reporting, data retention) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
